case_title: CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES VS. NARCELLA BANKS DBA GEMINI UNISEX HAIRSTYLING ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES AS TO DEFENDANT NARCELLA BANKS DBA GEMINI UNISEX HAIRSTYLING

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NARCELLA BANKS DBA GEMINI UNISEX HAIRSTYLING THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1045 FILLMORE STREET; 94115 ; CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.
DECLARATION THE PER DIEM DAMAGES FOR THE SUBJECT PREMISES HAS REMAINED $28.36 PER DAY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT NARCELLA BANKS DBA GEMINI UNISEX HAIRSTYLING
